_comment: Search query registry for completeness.py. Each query has a stable key, the source, and the search string. completeness.py runs each query and records what it returned + which trials it surfaced.

query_params.query.term: (PRMT5 OR MTAP OR MAT2A) AND inhibitor

ctgov_prmt5_mtap_inhibitor.rationale: Broad mechanism-class sweep. Catches every CT.gov-registered trial whose title or description mentions PRMT5, MTAP, or MAT2A combined with 'inhibitor'.

ctgov_methylthioadenosine_phosphorylase.rationale: Catches trials that spell out the full enzyme name (e.g. amgen MTAPESTRY-103 uses long form).

query_params.query.intr: AMG 193 OR anvumetostat OR MRTX1719 OR BMS-986504 OR navlimetostat OR TNG908 OR TNG462 OR vopimetostat OR TNG456 OR IDE397 OR AZD3470 OR HSK41959 OR BAY 3713372 OR GSK3326595 OR JNJ-64619178 OR PRT543 OR PRT811 OR PF-06939999

ctgov_known_drug_names.rationale: Drug-name sweep. Catches trials registered without explicit MTAP/PRMT5 mention (e.g. early FIH that lists drug code only).

ctgov_mta_cooperative.rationale: Sentinel query for any new MTA-cooperative PRMT5i programme.
